overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing vehicle driving on an elevated highway through Night City during golden hour. The scene features futuristic industrial architecture, massive digital billboards with anime aesthetics, and prominent signage for the Santo Domingo district. Warm sunlight bathes the scene while neon advertisements provide artificial accent lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway under digital billboard overpass

events.description: military-style truck passes in the left lane
passing directly under the overpass structure temporarily obscures the sky view

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the elevated highway, approaching and passing under a massive overpass covered in digital advertising screens

notable_agents.action: military-style armored truck driving in left lane and overtaking
dark sedan driving ahead in the same lane

entered.detail: massive steel girder overpass spanning the highway with support columns
series of bright LED screens displaying anime-style characters and Japanese text
gigantic futuristic tower with geometric panel patterns dominating the skyline ahead
yellow and black striped concrete barrier running along the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the vehicle driving on an elevated highway approaching a massive overpass structure covered in digital billboards. The industrial mega tower looms in the distance while a military truck overtakes on the left. Warm golden hour light mixes with the neon glow of the advertisements as the vehicle passes underneath the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated highway with directional signage

events.description: passing under overhead highway signs indicating Santo Domingo exit
vehicle follows a slight right curve in the highway alignment

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open highway, navigating a gentle right curve while passing under directional signage

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead and slightly to the right in the same lane

entered.detail: overhead gantry signs with white text indicating Santo Domingo district exit
large vertical advertising structure with purple and yellow graphics

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered overpass area, the highway opens up to full sky visibility with warm afternoon sunlight. The vehicle passes under the Santo Domingo exit signs while the industrial mega tower shifts to the left side of the frame. Large billboard structures begin appearing on the right side of the road as the highway curves gently to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway corridor with large commercial billboards

events.description: large taco advertisement billboard temporarily fills the right side of the frame
camera begins tilting upward to view the top of the industrial tower

agents.ego_description: driving past large billboard advertisements on the right while approaching closer to the mega tower base

entered.detail: large purple billboard advertising burritos with 'CALIENTE' and 'FLAVOR' text
billboard displaying police officer image with 'BE PART OF THE' and 'POLICE' text
massive cylindrical industrial structure marked with number 07 and metal scaffolding

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the highway passing a series of large commercial billboards on the right, including advertisements for food and police recruitment. The industrial mega tower grows larger on the left as the camera approaches its base. The camera begins tilting upward to capture the scale of the surrounding industrial architecture and overhead wire networks.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway with towering industrial structures and overhead infrastructure

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward to view the top of the industrial tower and overhead wires
camera returns to forward-facing driving position

agents.ego_description: continuing to drive while camera tilts up to admire the massive tower and industrial structures, then returns to road level

notable_agents.action: dark sedan overtaking in the left lane

entered.detail: dense network of cables and electrical wires crossing above the highway
large purple billboard with 'BRAIN CHEMISTRY' text and stylized neon graphics

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts dramatically upward to reveal the full height of the industrial mega tower against the blue sky, showcasing the dense network of overhead power lines and industrial scaffolding. After admiring the architecture, the camera returns to the forward driving position, passing more billboards including one for 'Brain Chemistry' while another vehicle overtakes on the left. The highway continues toward the distant cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along an elevated highway that transitions from the shadow of a massive overpass into a wide, sun-drenched industrial corridor. It begins with the vehicle approaching a towering overpass covered in digital billboards, passing beneath the structure as warm golden hour light blends with neon glows and a military truck overtakes on the left. As the vehicle exits the covered area, the highway opens to full sky visibility and the camera passes under Santo Domingo exit signs while the road curves gently to the right. The scene then shifts toward the base of a looming industrial mega tower, with the camera tilting dramatically upward to reveal the full height of the scaffolding and a dense network of overhead power lines against the blue sky. Finally, the camera returns to a forward-facing position, passing commercial billboards for food and brain chemistry as the vehicle continues toward the distant cityscape.
